---
title: "Der Theuerdank"
---

## Der Theuerdank

**Author:** Melchior Pfintzing
**Date:** 1517

### Notes

CMY used this supposed autobiography of Maximilian I as a source for <i>The Dove in the Eagle\'s Nest</i>.  She appears to have consulted several different editions.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
